name: Gentse Feesten
traditions: Street theater; puppet shows; open-air concerts; techno parade; medieval market; Flemish folk music; Polé Polé world music tent.
historicalBackground: Gentse Feesten began in 1843 as a series of musical performances. It has grown into one of Europe's largest cultural festivals.
description: Europe's largest cultural city festival, transforming Ghent's medieval center into ten days of non-stop music, theater, and street art.
